description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the GO111MODULES variable as on and two stages: test and release. In the test stage add two jobs named "test golang 1.11" and "test golang 1.12" that use the golang:1.11 and golang:1.12 Docker images respectively and run the script: go fmt ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./.... In the release stage add a "release" job that runs only on git tags, uses the golang:1.12 image, creates a publish directory, builds a Linux binary with GOOS=linux go build -ldflags "-X main.version=`git describe`" -o publish/snippet_linux, computes its sha256sum, builds a Darwin binary with GOOS=darwin go build -ldflags "-X main.version=`git describe`" -o publish/snippet_darwin, computes its sha256sum, and publishes both binaries as artifacts.
